authors.author: Tommy Walker
Tommy Walker
Drum ihm zur Ehre (Er kam als Mensch, hat alles gut gemacht)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He came to live, live a perfect life He came to be The loving word our light He came to die So we’d be reconciled He came to rise to show His pow’r and might

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And that’s why we praise Him, That’s why we sing That’s why we offer Him our everything That’s why we bow down And worship this King Cause He gave His everything Cause He gave His everything

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He came to live, live again in us He came to be our Conquering King and friend He came to heal And show the lost ones His love He came to go prepare a place for us
